description: The MeshAssetMetadata component gives info about the data on a mesh component.

fields.Mesh: The mesh to get meta data on.
fields.PointCount: the amount of vertices with no connected faces in ``Mesh``.
fields.SubmeshCount: How many sub meshes are in the main ``Mesh``.
fields.HasUV0s: Whether ``Mesh`` has data for the first UV map.
fields.HasUV1s: Whether ``Mesh`` has data for the second UV map.
fields.HasUV2s: Whether ``Mesh`` has data for the third UV map.
fields.HasUV3s: Whether ``Mesh`` has data for the fourth UV map.

usage: Attach to a slot and provide a Mesh to ``Mesh`` to make the component output data.
